enrichment.note: Official actuals pulled where keys/network allowed; missing values are null (never fabricated).

surprise.reaction_interpretation: Initial Jobless Claims produced a material surprise, but the market implication remains conditional on rates, the dollar, volatility, and positioning.
Initial Jobless Claims was close to consensus, so cross-asset interpretation depends more on revisions, composition, and prior positioning than the headline difference alone.
